code: export const PLAN_OPTIONS=["1 Month","3 Months","6 Months","1 Year"];export function getPlanEndDate(startDate,plan){const date=new Date(startDate);if(plan==="1 Month"){date.setMonth(date.getMonth()+1);}if(plan==="3 Months"){date.setMonth(date.getMonth()+3);}if(plan==="6 Months"){date.setMonth(date.getMonth()+6);}if(plan==="1 Year"){date.setFullYear(date.getFullYear()+1);}return date.toISOString().split("T")[0];}export function getMembershipState(planEnd){if(!planEnd){return{label:"Unknown",tone:"neutral"};}const today=new Date();const endDate=new Date(planEnd);today.setHours(0,0,0,0);endDate.setHours(0,0,0,0);const diffInDays=Math.ceil((endDate-today)/(1000*60*60*24));if(diffInDays<0){return{label:"Expired",tone:"danger"};}if(diffInDays<=3){return{label:"Expiring soon",tone:"warning"};}return{label:"Active",tone:"success"};}export function formatDisplayDate(value){if(!value){return"Not recorded";}return new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-US",{dateStyle:"medium"}).format(new Date(`${value}T00:00:00`));}export function isAttendedToday(lastAttended){return lastAttended===new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];}
